conventions.name: packages-have-src-barrel
conventions.description: Workspace packages are consumed as source through src/index.ts, except config-only (tsconfig), glob-exported (ui), and eval-only (evals) packages.

conventions.name: api-route-modules
conventions.description: Each Hono route module exports a create{Resource}Routes factory and builds its sub-router with createApiRouter, so zod validation and the OpenAPI document share one definition.

conventions.name: ai-tools-export-tool
conventions.description: Each AI tool module exports a {toolName}Tool definition.

conventions.name: email-templates
conventions.description: Each email template declares a {Name}Email component.

conventions.name: evals-use-evalite
conventions.description: Eval suites are defined with evalite.

conventions.name: shared-utils-exports
conventions.description: Each @webld/utils module exports a function named after its file.
